description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane with a wide fuselage, four underwing turbofan engines, and a distinctive blue tail fin adorned with white stars. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with slightly swept-back wings and prominent winglets at the tips. The fuselage is primarily white with the word 'HiFly' displayed in blue on the forward section, and the engines are painted blue with white accents. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a conventional horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it is either retracted or not modeled.
description: A large white and blue commercial passenger airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, swept low wings, and a blue star-patterned tail fin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide fuselage, cockpit windows, and all four engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'HiFly' logo, blue engines, and the star-patterned tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the full wingspan with winglets.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the 'HiFly' logo, blue engines, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable tricycle configuration based on typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
